blocks.content: Same airports. Same distances. Same two schools pulling in opposite directions. But the thing between them had a name now, and a shape, and the weight of it was the good kind — the kind you carry because you chose to.
back in LA. darius already reorganized the room
it's actually kind of comforting at this point
my girlfriend is in negative 6 degrees
your fiancée is going to be in negative 6 degrees if you don't hurry up
He set his phone down. Looked at his bag still zipped on the bed. Outside, LA was doing what LA did — loud and bright and indifferent to everything happening in his chest.
He'd been thinking about it since before July. Since longer than that, if he was honest.
